description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a modern, urban-inspired outfit. He wears a hooded short-sleeve top with a high collar that partially covers his face, paired with fitted athletic pants and gloves. The ensemble includes arm sleeves and a sash or strap hanging from the waist, suggesting a sporty or streetwear influence. His shoes are thick-soled and designed for comfort and movement, while his hands are gloved, adding to the athletic or tactical appearance. The figure's face is mostly obscured by the hood and mask, giving him a mysterious, vigilant look suitable for urban environments.
description: A hooded adult male in modern athletic streetwear with gloves, mask, and fitted pants, exuding a sporty and vigilant urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded head, partially masked face, short-sleeve top, gloves, and athletic pants with a sash at the waist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the arm sleeve, and the hanging sash detail at the waist.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the hood, the full length of the arm sleeves, and the sash or strap hanging from the right hip.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hood profile, arm sleeve, and the sash detail, with the gloved hand visible.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic hooded top with short sleeves, fitted athletic pants, arm sleeves, gloves, and a waist sash
attribute_hairstyle: short hair partially covered by hood
